documentation: This Intel® oneAPI Runtime COMMON LIBRARIES package contains shared common libraries needed to provide a unified interface to device agnostic runtimes such as DPC++ across a wide variety of software platforms.  This COMMON Libraries package should be downloaded and installed along with the COMMON LICENSING package and one or more of the Compiler-Specific runtimes.
